programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Rock N' Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is visited by his Dutch family and Charles L.A. lady.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Hog Days of Summer
programme.desc: Michigan's hot summer is taking a toll on both Dr. Pol and the local farm animals. A think blanket of humidity is making it hard for Dr. Pol and Charles to save a newborn calf with pneumonia. Meanwhile, Dr. Brenda helps a stubborn pig give birth.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Red, White and Moo
programme.desc: Before enjoying the fourth of July, Dr. Pol must take care of the animals. Brenda prescribes anti-anxiety medication to a puppy so she can get through the fireworks and Dr. Pol tries to help a very sick dog in distress.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: What's Up, Doc?
programme.desc: The Pol clinic helps a guineau pig with some attitude, some piglets that are having trouble eating, and Hope the calf with a dislocated hip. Later, Dr. Pol is convinced to judge a chilli cookoff.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair brings a lot of animals to the clinic for last minute checkups by Dr. Pol and his team before they are shown at the 4-H competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Jingle Pols
programme.desc: It’s time to get into the Christmas spirit Pol style as Dr. Pol and Charles take a look back at some of the best moments from this season of The Incredible Dr. Pol.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Bear Brawl
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley travels to a bear sanctuary where she ends up in the middle of a brother bear brawl.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: No Bull
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley travels to Prince Edward Island to tackle an American bison inbreeding problem.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Poking the Bear
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley performs examinations on two black bears during a dangerous relocation.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Alpacapalooza
programme.desc: The doctors are busy taking care of the rural Georgia animal population.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens Unexplained
programme.desc: Cameras capture unidentified aerial objects moving across the skies of Ukraine and a mysterious tentacle creature on the tropical beaches of St. Lucia. Experts use cutting-edge science to investigate what may be actual evidence of alien phenomenon.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: LIVE
programme.desc: Hosted by Josh Gates, a live panel of experts unpacks and weighs in on the long-awaited Department of Defense and Office of the Director of National Intelligence report about Unidentified Flying Objects, recently released to Congress.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: UFOs in the U.S.A.
programme.desc: Cameras capture lights in the night sky of the Mojave Desert and a strange object above the Oak Ridge National Laboratory in Tennessee. Experts use cutting edge tech to investigate documented UFO sightings across the US.

programme.title: UFOs Declassified: LIVE
programme.desc: Hosted by Josh Gates, a live panel of experts unpacks and weighs in on the long-awaited Department of Defense and Office of the Director of National Intelligence report about Unidentified Flying Objects, recently released to Congress.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: UFOs in the U.S.A.
programme.desc: Cameras capture lights in the night sky of the Mojave Desert and a strange object above the Oak Ridge National Laboratory in Tennessee. Experts use cutting edge tech to investigate documented UFO sightings across the US.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Doomsday Mummies
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal dark secrets of the event that destroyed Pompeii.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Cursed Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's strange bent pyramid is one of the world's most mysterious ancient mega-structures, and new discoveries help experts investigate its dark secret: if it was always intended to look so bizarre, or if something went catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secret History of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Recent forensic findings uncover the astonishing secrets of the world's most iconic monument, the great Sphinx at Giza. Join the extraordinary investigation as it reveals which pharaoh commissioned this colossal statue and why it was never finished.

programme.title: Unearthed: Viking City of the Dead
programme.desc: When a mysterious Viking fortress lost underground for over a thousand years is discovered, experts investigate its buried treasures to reveal what caused the end of this fearsome civilization.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Forbidden City
programme.desc: For the first time, archaeologists use cutting-edge technology to discover what lies beneath China's Forbidden City, revealing the dark secrets of this mysterious mega-palace that have remained buried for nearly 600 years.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of Seahenge
programme.desc: A prehistoric megastructure emerges from the sands of an English shore that could reveal lost mysteries to the Bronze Age; using pioneering technology and 3-D imaging analysis, experts investigate and uncover dark, ancient rituals once performed here.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: American Nightmare
programme.desc: John follows the trail of fugitive Leroy Headley whose 911 call sends police down a dark and twisting path that unravels a history of violence. Cal uncovers hidden truths behind the case of Jeffrey Forrest, a dangerous sexual predator on the run.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Tears For My Mother
programme.desc: A man calls 911 claiming he found his ex-girlfriend dead, and his behavior on the call leads police to wonder if he could be involved. Investigators tirelessly gather evidence to convict a killer whose unchecked rage left a young son motherless.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Blind Love
programme.desc: Thirty-one-year-old, Gabriel Montanez is found shot in a liquor store parking lot in Kalamazoo, Michigan. Two men in hooded sweatshirts are seen fleeing from the scene. Police then make a shocking discovery that leads to the truth behind the homicide.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: This Guy's Getting Paranoid
programme.desc: Roaa Al-Dhanoon has disappeared. What begins as a missing persons case, takes a disturbing turn by someone who is closest to her. Now, detectives must unravel a complex web of deceit that continues to strike fear throughout the devastated community.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: I Forgive You
programme.desc: In 2003, a young man in Georgia shoots his father in the head sixteen times. Days later, the dismembered body of a nun turns up on the side of a Virginia road. The story behind these two crimes haunts those involved to this day.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Animal Nature
programme.desc: When a young woman is found mysteriously slaughtered on the steps of a trailer, Kenda and the homicide team must track down the vile perpetrators responsible for a horrifying string of cold-blooded murders.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: I Forgive You
programme.desc: In 2003, a young man in Georgia shoots his father in the head sixteen times. Days later, the dismembered body of a nun turns up on the side of a Virginia road. The story behind these two crimes haunts those involved to this day.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Who Took Heather?
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl is missing, sending Kenda's city into a panic. Who is responsible? Just when investigators think they've got a handle on what is going on, a cryptic letter to the District Attorney's office suggests the girl isn't the only victim.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Bloody Footprint
programme.desc: Maurice Goins, a friendly neighbor who provides meals to other tenants in his apartment complex, is found murdered in his bedroom. The case goes cold, until Lakewood, Ohio police suddenly receive a tip and the investigation is thrown into overdrive.

programme.title: Home Alone: Inheriting Evil
programme.desc: CeCe Coffee is a Southern Belle with a beautiful home but very little home security. In a bizarre case of mistaken identity, she falls prey to a brutal home invasion that will force her to think on her feet if she wants to stay alive.

programme.title: Home Alone: Ex-ecutioner
programme.desc: When a single mom breaks up with her volatile boyfriend, she finds out he has other plans for her. Armed with a gun, he holds her hostage. As her life hangs in the balance, she has no idea her friend on the SWAT team is determined to save her.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Married to the Mob
programme.desc: Lee Ann discovers the dark side of her husband, gym-owner Paul, and runs for help. Alex offers a shoulder to cry on; Rocco takes her to bed. But then, Paul and she seem to work things out—until late one night, when shots ring out behind the gym.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: A playbook for Murder
programme.desc: In 2008, Sam and Mirinda Boob are the toast of the tiny town of Centre Hall, Pennsylvania. But the former cheerleader has a taste for betrayal and it sends her right into the arms of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dr. Deception
programme.desc: When Jean Claude Dominique is the victim of a hit-and-run, his wife Eliette rushes to his side. It's there she comes face-to-face with his OTHER wife. It's her first glimpse into his double life that leads to her fighting for her own.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: When Ignacio Garraus meets Shawna Nelson, there's instant heat – despite them both being married to other people. While he's just looking for a good time, she's falling in love.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Never Coming Home
programme.desc: A mother and her two young sons vanish in rural Wyoming, prompting a nationwide search. Leads dry up and the case goes cold... until a dark secret is revealed, leading investigators to another homicide they had no clue could solve four murders.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Onward, Christian Soldier
programme.desc: While her husband serves in the army, a lonely married mother of three finds comfort in the arms of her church's charismatic new minister. But danger looms in the form of a jealous love-rival that will stop at nothing to scare her away.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love Is War
programme.desc: A decorated marine faces war at home when he falls for a married woman. Suspicion and jealousy plague their affair as they battle to keep their secret from their spouses but with the stakes so high it's a truth they'll stop at nothing to hide.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Night Shift
programme.desc: A rookie cop struggles to resist temptation when he meets a beautiful exotic dancer while on shift. But he's keeping secrets not just from his sergeants but his new girlfriend too. And he'll stop at nothing to keep his double life secret.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sins of the Heart
programme.desc: Young, rich, and religious, John and Nikki Hillrich fall in love at college. It's a match made in heaven- but hell is not far off. When desire collides with faith, secret lives marked by sinful liaisons and menacing new friends shatter their perfect life.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Thin Blue Line
programme.desc: Sheriff deputies with a perfect marriage reveal a shocking tale of good cop/ bad cop that can only end in a fugitive on the run.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Lethal Romance
programme.desc: An ambitious Harlem couple dreams of a better life for themselves. Unfortunately they're stuck in a bitter cycle of poverty poor health and mistrust leading one of them to decide to put their dreams to rest, forever.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Weaponology: Extreme Warriors
programme.desc: Extreme warriors are trained to live and fight in the harshest environments known to man: exposed mountaintops, extreme altitude, sub-zero temperatures, and snowstorms.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Navy Seals
programme.desc: Masters of stealth and lords of destruction, the US Navy SEALs are the most versatile special operations force in the world. See the evolution of their cutting edge weapons and insertion techniques.

programme.title: Weaponology: Extreme Warriors
programme.desc: Extreme warriors are trained to live and fight in the harshest environments known to man: exposed mountaintops, extreme altitude, sub-zero temperatures, and snowstorms.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Icons of Freedom
programme.desc: Discover the secrets behind some of America's biggest icons.

programme.title: Raid on the Reactor
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the government of Israel is releasing top secret documents detailing the secret plans, strategies and implementation of their raid on the Iraqi nuclear facility in 1981, one of the most daring and successful military strikes ever.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Charlie Richardson
programme.desc: Charlie Richardson was the head of the notorious Richardson gang who built up a lucrative empire by extortion, fraud and torture. Enter Gerald MacArthur who began a painstaking investigation at a time when corruption was rife in the Metropolitan Police.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: The Krays
programme.desc: English gangsters and twin brothers Ronald and Reginald Kray were the foremost perpetrators of organized crime in the East End of London during the '50s and '60s.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bruce Reynolds
programme.desc: Bruce Reynolds was a career criminal who, looking for his defining moment, planned a daring train robbery in 1963. Reynolds secretly organised a gang of 15 men to bring down a Royal Mail train carrying over two million pounds in cash.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family. A local agent helps the couple land a charming lakefront property, but it's in need of major improvements.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big Reno With Astounding Views on Apple Valley Lake in Ohio
programme.desc: A couple customizes an Ohio lakefront home for their large family.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lakeside Lounging on Lake Gaston
programme.desc: Amber and Jon are looking for a getaway near their home in Raleigh, NC, and Lake Gaston fits the bill. With assistance from their broker, they find a house with a price that's as perfect as the location but the condition of the home is less than ideal.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Loving Life on Lake Tawakoni in Texas
programme.desc: Water enthusiasts Matt and Heather are looking for a vacation property close to their Dallas home on Lake Tawakoni in Texas.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Build
programme.desc: A family looks for a vacation home on Logan Martin Lake, Alabama, in hopes of getaways filled with fishing, kayaking and relaxation. They find a fixer-upper with water views, but the extensive renovations may break the budget.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's Tiki Time
programme.desc: The Pool Kings whip up a Tiki-themed, resort-style pool featuring a custom putting green for the entire family to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Georgia Peach Pool Paradise
programme.desc: The Parrish family has saved their whole lives to build a tropical pool paradise in the heart of Georgia. But not everything is peachy on this build when hard soil and a complicated lazy river design present major challenges for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Lake Resort Pool
programme.desc: An active family in southern California wants an extravagant pool to remind them of their favorite lakeside vacations. The kings don't know which is bigger, their clients' wish list or the 20-foot jumping cliff they have to create from scratch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hole in the Plan
programme.desc: An active Florida family recently traded in the tropical life for the cool countryside in Auburntown, Tennessee.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All the Way Around
programme.desc: Mike and Jim have their work cut out for them when a Palm Springs couple wants to transform their narrow three-sided backyard into a personal resort by adding a grotto, zen area, putting green, oversized spa, and beach entry.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Spa Fabulous
programme.desc: After recovering from a harrowing parachuting incident, a military veteran learned to walk again, got married, started a family and is now ready to build a pool. The custom oasis includes a jumping rock, a Baja shelf and plunge spa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: California Dreamin'
programme.desc: Noah is California dreamin' for the Golden State's best carnival eats. He sets things on fire with a Deep Pit BBQ dinner, gets groovy with the Green Goddess and celebrates with Birthday Cake Crepes.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Close Encounters Of The Food Kind
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is hot on the trail of some otherworldly carnival eats at the UFO Festival in Roswell.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The King's Peach
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the Big Fresno Fair in California, where local legend Chicken Charlie has a triple treat stacked up on a stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Tacos
programme.desc: Americans love tacos, and Roger Mooking is scouring the country for the 15 best tacos around. The options for fillings range from pork to fish to alligator in hard, soft and even puffy shells.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Charleston Chowdown
programme.desc: Food Paradise chows down on the evolving food scene in Charleston, SC. Country classics like smothered catfish share the table with notable newcomers like a grilled BBQ brisket and pimento cheese sandwich and a breakfast pizza.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Street Eats
programme.desc: Diners get down and dirty with the best street food in the country, from chicken wings that defy crispiness and pizza-topped burgers to fiery hot shrimp and fresh-from-the-sea salmon tacos.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Jordan Andino travels to Washington, DC, for a truly capital late-night experience. He starts his night with a cheesy pimento burger at EatBar, samples a Hong Kong sweet treat at Tiger Fork and ends at The Passenger for their famous Porchetta Sandwich.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers
programme.desc: The deceptively simple ground meat served on a bun with the perfect combo of condiments and garnishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Home Cooking
programme.desc: Roger scours the U.S. for all of the best treats from childhood, including home-cooked treats and decadent desserts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireplace Feasts
programme.desc: Roger loves cooking in a fireplace. He visits two places in New England that host fireplace feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heavy Metal Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking gets blown away by not one but two of the biggest metal-clad rigs he's ever seen. In Algoma, WI, he meets brothers Brad and Aric Schmiling who use a giant cinder block pit and massive metal grates to roast a whole steer.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ in Big Cities
programme.desc: Roger knows it's not just small towns that dish out big flavours. He heads to Bludso's Bar and Que in L.A., where the owner brings meat and hear to Tinseltown in a big way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoking and Spit-Roasting in Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking finds two chefs in Texas who are pushing the boundaries of whole hog barbecue, where pigs are roasted low and slow over coals before the meat is chopped or pulled and seasoned with sauce.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cruises the Florida coastline for two fiery cookouts that bring the heat. First, he visits Chef Marcel Vizcarra, owner of modern Peruvian eatery Llama Restaurant in St. Augustine, Fla.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Derby Day to Down State
programme.desc: In Louisville Kentucky at the Kentucky Derby Festival, custom made pizza. Later, it's time to get a little bit country with Ozark style loaded fries, piled high with pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Portland Rose Festival and Got to Be NC Fair
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe is in Portland to try beef tongue tacos. He then heads to North Carolina for a donut sloppy Joe.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meadowlands State Fair/ Gardendale Magnolia Festival
programme.desc: Noah Cappe samples the freak show food of New Jersey and tries southern sweep potato pie ice cream.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Lights and Literature
programme.desc: Noah tries his hand at making a deep fried root beer float and torches a berry brulee waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burgers and Bombs

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cowboys and Cakes

programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Anchors Away/ Prospector Pups
programme.desc: Bob rents a floating house on the Mississippi River with Bingo and Rolly. Bob and the Pugs go on a Wild West-themed vacation.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Lab Four
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Time Flies/ Prank Calls
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany are convinced Simon has vanished back in time and go all out in an attempt to bring him back. A prank call by Alvin gets out of hand when the person on the other end of the line vows to track him down.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theodore's Calling/ Clumsy Jeanette
programme.desc: Miss Croner attempts to help Theodore discover his true calling in life. Jeanette is suddenly very clumsy because of her new glasses.

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria attempt to leave Madagascar but wind up landing in Africa. Alex meets his family but struggles to communicate with them due to his easy life in the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: A New Squid in Town/ Wish Fixers
programme.desc: Mark Chang has to be protected from a forced wedding; Timmy's on a bad wishmaking streak.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: You Doo/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Timmy gets his hands on 'YouDoo' dolls; Timmy wishes for all food on Earth to be desserts.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karma Chameleon/ Team Effort
programme.desc: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Butterfly Effect/ The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household.

programme.title: The Loud House: Selfie Improvement/ No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Mad Scientist/ Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tails of Woe/ The Last Loud on Earth
programme.desc: The gang suspects the Rat Beast, a student urban legend, is responsible for Stella's missing music box. Then, after watching zombie movies, Clyde and Lincoln assume an empty Loud house is the result of a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gary's Got Legs/ King Plankton
programme.desc: Gary gets a set of legs to keep up with SpongeBob, but makes his owner look sluggish by comparison. And, Plankton practices ruling the world by shrinking himself and declaring himself king od SpongeBob's aquarium.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick! The Game/ The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new boardgame. Later, SpongeBob and Squidward flush Mr. Krabs' safe and must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Safe Deposit Krabs/ Plankton's Pet
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets trapped in Bikini Bottom's brand-new bank and it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to save him. After failing to steal the Krabby Patty formula, Plankton gets a pet to cheer himself up.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: The group must pass through the ominous Swamp of Fears.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shanghaied
programme.desc: An anchor gets lodged into Squidward's window and SpongeBob, Pat and Squidward all climb the rope to see who is responsible.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Gramma's Secret Recipe/ The Cent of Money
programme.desc: Plankton disguises himself as SpongeBob's grandmother.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krab Borg
programme.desc: SpongeBob stays up late one night watching a sci-fi film where robots take over the world. He comes to work paranoid. Through a series of wild coincidences, SpongeBob gets it in his head that Mr. Krabs is a robot.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Wolf Head Bread/ Rock n' Roar
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce want to impress T-Midi by delivering him the rarest bread in all the Bread Mines: Wolf Head Bread. SwaySway and Buhdeuce help their rock idol get his career back on track.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pre-Hibernation Week/ Life of Crime
programme.desc: Sandy is going into hibernation; it's alright to 'borrow' things if you return them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jelly Fishing/ Plankton
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick take Squidward jelly fishing; Spongebob falls for Plankton's scheme.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: What's Love Gato Do With It/ Dial M. for Mustard
programme.desc: After a magician hypnotizes Bobby into thinking he's a cat, the family needs to snap him out of it. Ronnie Anne and friends try to uncover what happened to Bruno's hot dog cart.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: V.I.Peeved/ Señor Class
programme.desc: When her blog is discovered by a famous musician, Carlota fears her family will embarrass her. Then, when Hector decides to finish his schooling, he become Ronnie Anne and Carl's new classmate.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Cursed!
programme.desc: Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Operation Dad
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city with the help of Sid.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: I, Breakfast Bot/ Dynamic Do-Over
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Broken Alarm/ Karen's Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his alarm clock and nothing else is loud enough to wake him up. And, Karen learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Pictures, Please/ Stuck on the Roof
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom. SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he won't let that stop him from living his life.

programme.title: Movie: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: With April's help, the Turtles find out that The Shredder has returned and has hired a scientist to create mutants of his own. Adding to their troubles, New York City is invaded by an extraterrestrial army. The Turtles face their toughest fight yet.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: To Serve and Protect/ Kickin' It Old School
programme.desc: Simon is ecstatic when he's elected the school's safety monitor, but when Alvin goofs off at school, Simon has to choose between doing the right thing or giving Alvin detention. Dave takes away the Chipmunks technology.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Miss Dimmsdale/ Mind Over Magic
programme.desc: Vicky will stop at nothing to win the Miss Dimmsdale Pageant; Timmy can read minds.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Hard Copy/ Parent Hoods
programme.desc: Wanda leaves Timmy a magic photocopier; Timmy meets a couple who look like his parents.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Odd Couple/ Class Clown
programme.desc: Ricky wishes up the perfect boyfriend for Vicky so she'll be too busy to baby-sit.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Farm Pit/ Crock Talk
programme.desc: Dad decides to convert the Turner home into a farm. Unfortunately, it takes Cosmo and Wanda's magic to give Dad a green thumb and when they're swept away by a tornado, it's up to Timmy to save the farm and his fairies!

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Mexican Makeover/ Uptown Funk
programme.desc: With Mama Lupe coming to visit, Abuela tries to make sure her family represents their culture perfectly. Adelaide and Carl must work together on an adventure on Mr. Chang's route.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Trend Game/ This Bird Has Flown
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Art for Art's Sake/ Mancave
programme.desc: Brittany takes up painting to impress her fashion idol. But her idol only likes her art after Alvin accidentally ruins it. Alvin, convinced that Julie and her son are trying to move into their home, tries to stop it.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Going Green/ Tattle Tail
programme.desc: Jeanette signs the Chipmunks and Chipettes up for a green living competition. Alvin likes a girl at school so he agrees to look after her talking bird, but he's nervous about the bird blabbing when he says something damaging.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's in the House/ Minor Monogram
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb can't find Perry and decide to create the Perrytronic 3000, a mechanical structure that can assume any form.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Excaliferb!
programme.desc: During medieval times, Phineas and Ferb set off on an epic quest to find the legendary sword, Excaliferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Monster From Id/ Gi-Ants
programme.desc: After losing a gift that Jeremy made for her, Candace is determined to recreate it before he realizes it's missing. Candace can't remember what it looks like, and has Phineas and Ferb use their mind machine to recapture her memory of it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Agent Doof/ Phineas and Ferb the Temple of Juatchadoon
programme.desc: The boys go to Central America to help Damsel in Distress, after finding an amulet, but Dr. Doofenshmirtz wants to use their amulet to destroy the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: This Is Your Backstory
programme.desc: Agent P realizes there is more going on with Norm than just a simple odd reality show to celebrate his creator, Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Parker Plays: And I'm Shelby...
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Who Let the Frogs Out?
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Welcome to the Dungeon
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Tales From the Resistance
programme.desc: After Doofenshmirtz is defeated, a new threat in the Second Dimension emerges, leaving it up to Phineas, Ferb, Candace and her resistance fighters to defeat this new foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Return of the Rogue Rabbit/ Live and Let Drive
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz breaks a rogue animal agent out of high security prison and Perry must go to the glamorous Duchy of Montevillebad to stop Doof from winning the Grand Prix.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket Versus/ Blue Tater
programme.desc: Cricket must wrestle a wild animal in order to prove himself worthy of the Green family name. When Cricket persuades Bill to convert his pickup into a French fry food truck, he discovers a mysterious blue potato that Gramma says is cursed with bad luck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike
programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Fast and the Phineas/ Lawn Gnome Beach Party of Terror
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb enter into a race with a 'tricked out' family car. In the meantime, Perry and Platypus try to stop Dr. Doofenshmirtz from deflating everything that is inflatable in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Magnificent Few/ S'winter
programme.desc: As cowboys, Phineas and Ferb drive a herd of cattle across the badlands. Dad shows the boys how to make snow cones with a machine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Are You My Mummy?/ Flop Starz
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide they want their very own mummy after visiting a local Egyptian movie theatre. A reality show singing competition comes to town and the boys decide they want to become one hit wonders.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Raging Bully/ Lights, Candace, Action!
programme.desc: Phineas is challenged to a duel by the local bully and enters the ring for a thumb wrestling competition. Then Candace gets her chance at fame until Phineas and Ferb enter as directors.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Get That Bigfoot Outa My Face!/ Tree to Get Ready
programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Jerk de Soleil/ Toy to the World
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on their own show when the Cirque De Lune is unexpectedly cancelled. Then, the boys invent the world's most popular toy, but it doesn't do anything.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: A Hard Day's Knight/ I, Brobot
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb put on a medieval tournament; Candace takes the role of the Black Knight.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mom's Birthday Episode/ Journey to the Center of Candace
programme.desc: Candace wants to plan a special birthday for Mom; Phineas and Ferb build a submarine.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's a Mud, Mud, Mud, Mud World/ The Ballad of Badbeard
programme.desc: Grandpa tells the story of a mysterious pirate legend surrounding the old lake around their house. Candice is too scared to learn how to drive, but the boys try to help her overcome the fear.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ready for the Bettys/ The Flying Fishmonger
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Get Busted
programme.desc: Candace has finally busted her brothers and sent away to Smile Away Reformatory School. How long can Candace enjoy her summer with Jeremy and Stacy instead of her usual routine?

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Greece Lightning/ Leave the Busting to Us!
programme.desc: The boys stage a chariot race through the streets, just like it was done in ancient Greece. Candace secretly films her brothers designing a white-water rafting ride.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Yokel Hero

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Wedding
programme.desc: Sophia refuses to attend an old friend's funeral because her husband Max will be there.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sophia's Wedding

programme.title: The Middle: Valentine's Day VI

programme.title: The Middle: The Answer
programme.desc: The Heck family learns about Darrin's marriage proposal to Sue as well as her response. Meanwhile, Axl attempts to use his intro to Psych class to cure Brick of all of his quirks and tics.

programme.title: The Middle: Steaming Pile of Guilt

programme.title: The Office: Garage Sale

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Managing Your Wallet and Weight
programme.desc: How to reset our metabolism and lose weight. From passion to profit: An innovative business opportunity for today's entrepreneur; savvy savings for families with coupon dot com. app on your phone.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: All I Want Is You
programme.desc: As the hospital deals with Meredith's trauma, Callie and Maggie perform a risky, experimental surgery on Alex's 15-year-old patient against his professional opinion.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Unbreak My Heart
programme.desc: A series of flashbacks recount April and Jackson's relationship. Also, a patient's progress is followed for several years.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: My Next Life
programme.desc: A patient from Meredith's very first surgery as an Intern is readmitted to Grey Sloan Memorial with a new aneurysm, and Amelia takes her case. Meanwhile, Maggie suspects that Richard knows about her relationship with Andrew.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: All Eyez on Me
programme.desc: Meredith, Bailey, Jackson, Callie and Jo travel to a military hospital to perform an extraordinary and extremely risky surgery on a veteran with an advanced tumour. Meanwhile, back at Grey Sloan, Andrew is tired of being Maggie's worst kept secret.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Richard throws everyone for a loop when he switches the resident and attending pairings. Arizona takes a huge risk on a woman who is pregnant with quadruplets. Meanwhile, April is faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Am Not Waiting Anymore
programme.desc: Jackson learns about April's pregnancy, while Alex and the team of doctors handle an hours-long triple-organ transplant surgery. Meredith considers dating again, and Andrew insists on not receiving special treatment after he and Maggie go public.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: When It Hurts So Bad
programme.desc: Meredith takes a step forward with Will but quickly regrets it. Maggie senses a disconnection with Andrew, and Amelia re-evaluates her relationship with Owen. Meanwhile, Catherine comes into town and really shakes things up with April and Jackson.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Wear the Face
programme.desc: Meredith goes on an ambulance ride with Owen and Nathan to pick up a heart for a transplant patient. Musician & MS patient Kyle Diaz is admitted to Grey Sloan Memorial with a tremor in his hand, and the residents apply for the Preminger Grant.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: There's a Fine, Fine Line
programme.desc: After a missing child forces the hospital into lockdown, Ben decides to operate on a pregnant mother without the proper surgical equipment.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Justice Denied
programme.desc: Patty and Jerry Wetterling got a phone call in 1989 saying their son had been taken by an unknown abductor. For the past 25 years, new leads have come and gone, but they still await answers in his disappearance. Plus, scammers in Hawaii are on the run.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Burning Rage
programme.desc: Jennifer Puente is on the loose after allegedly torturing and setting her friend Moriah Gonzales on fire with her boyfriend Joe Alvarado.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse, who had been experiencing a variety of flu-like symptoms with no discernible explanation, is diagnosed as HIV-positive, and further investigation reveals that the method in which she contracted the disease was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dinner and a Movie
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her home while her husband is on a sailing trip. When investigating, police uncover a lifestyle of sex parties and wife swapping.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Fire sweeps through a mansion, killing two children, all evidence leads to the mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Sweet Homestead Alabama
programme.desc: The Raneys face an emotional rescue of young, inexperienced homesteaders in Alabama. To save the legacy of an 8th generation family property, they must use all new ingenuity including a solar kiln, tornado bunker and upcycled predator-proof coop.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Mississippi Mayhem (Part 1 of 2)
programme.desc: In Mississippi, the Raneys must first solve the mystery of flooding water before teaching a family of six to thrive off-grid together. Builds include a new Elvis-inspired 'Heartbreak Goat-tel' goat pen, garden compound and metal forge.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Mississippi Mayhem (Part 2 of 2)
programme.desc: The Raney's must solve a flooding water mystery before teaching a Mississippi family of six to thrive off-grid. Builds include a new Elvis-inspired 'Heartbreak Goat-tel' goat pen, garden compound and metal forge.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: A Golden Opportunity
programme.desc: The Raneys rescue the Kramers in Alaska by converting an old barn into a commercial fishing kitchen. But when Marty is suddenly forced to quarantine, Matt and Misty must finish alone, leading to the discovery of the homestead's biggest resource: gold.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Timber Frame House
programme.desc: A New York couple with a passion for snowboarding begins building a smart timber frame cabin in remote Vermont. Troubles soon begin when the home's instructions lead to confusion, making this dream nearly impossible to finish before the harsh winter hits.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: A Golden Opportunity
programme.desc: The Raneys rescue the Kramers in Alaska by converting an old barn into a commercial fishing kitchen. But when Marty is suddenly forced to quarantine, Matt and Misty must finish alone, leading to the discovery of the homestead's biggest resource: gold.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Timber Frame House
programme.desc: A New York couple with a passion for snowboarding begins building a smart timber frame cabin in remote Vermont. Troubles soon begin when the home's instructions lead to confusion, making this dream nearly impossible to finish before the harsh winter hits.

programme.title: Shipwreck Men: Bahama Drama
programme.desc: Big jobs bring big trouble as these salvagers take on the competition and each other. From a lucrative job in the Bahamas for Atlantis to an unusual one for the Arnold's, lives are always on the line.

programme.title: Shipwreck Men: Hurricane Alley
programme.desc: Hurricane Isaac blasts South Florida leaving wreckage and destruction for most, but gold for salvagers. High winds and an eleven-foot surge test the courage of these hardened men as they throw caution to the wind, risking it all to beat the competition.

programme.title: Shipwreck Men: A Mess in the Marquesas
programme.desc: A holiday weekend turns tragic as Atlantis races into action. The job of a lifetime could go bust, sinking Downrite's reputation. For Fast Response, a mistake could cost them the job. And the Arnold's struggle with a risky salvage and Ricky Sr.'s health.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dredge of Insanity
programme.desc: Kris attempts to save his season with a move that may be his worst idea yet. Shawn hunts for a pay-streak to solidify his position at the top. Emily prospects a claim to call her own. Vern tries out a 'crazy' new diver. Zeke sets sail on an adventure.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Once Upon a Mine
programme.desc: Nome's King Shawn edges closer to his goal of ultimate domination. Knight Kris tries his hand on an excavator dredge. Queen Emily has a pump crisis that could end her season. Wizard Zeke returns to Cape Rodney while Ogre Vernon leans on his last diver.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Good Man Down
programme.desc: To help boost production, Dave gives gold room operator Jesse Goins the opportunity he's been waiting for, to become a first-time rock truck driver. But all work stops when the crew faces a sudden and unimaginable tragedy.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of teammate Jesse Goins, the crew struggles to mine with one man down. When Dave comes under fire from the team about the lack of access to the gold-rich Hummocks, he heads off for a do or die showdown with the local community.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Enter the Promised Land
programme.desc: The team finally gains access to the potential motherlode in the Hummocks. But as soon as the crew begins, Box Creek is hit by a huge snow storm and Jason makes an alarming discovery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Winter's Warning
programme.desc: Team Turin races to smash their 400-ounce season goal in Hummocks gold. But the increasing amounts of heavy black sand, early snow and pressure from the local community threaten to derail their operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: X Marks the Spot

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bachelor Party

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drive, Drive, Drive

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pity in Pink

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.desc: 20 of the world's most moronic motorheads crash everything from golf carts to Segways to snowmobiles to Ferraris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 1)
programme.desc: Kris orchestrates a surprise family vacation to Vail, but their nostalgic getaway hits a bump when the family learns that Rob has proposed to Blac Chyna back in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 2)
programme.desc: The family vacation in Vail continues as everyone tries to process the shocking news of Rob's engagement. Meanwhile Scott tries to prove he can behave himself for the rest of the trip.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Oh Baby!
programme.desc: Fresh off the heels of his engagement announcement, Rob has another piece of news that will change the family forever. Meanwhile, Kylie struggles with anxiety from being in the spotlight.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Iced Out
programme.desc: On a trip to Iceland for Kanye's music video shoot over Kourtney's birthday weekend, Kim finds herself spread too thin as she tries to cater to both her sister and her husband. Meanwhile, Scott debates showing up in Ireland to surprise Kourtney.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Got MILF?
programme.desc: Feeling that Kanye is constantly misunderstood and unfairly vilified, Kim struggles over whether to publicly take a stand for her husband. Kim also prepares for her sexy cameo in Fergie's 'MILF$' music video.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Havana Good Day
programme.desc: The girls jet off for a once in a lifetime trip to the formerly restricted country of Cuba. Meanwhile, Kourtney butts heads with a family member and Kris starts to lose it when she can't reach her girls overseas.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Havana Good Night
programme.desc: As the Kardashian Cuban vacation continues, Kim’s commitment to her work engagements on Mother’s Day stirs up a disagreement. Meanwhile, Scott comes down with a major case of FOMO, and Kim tries to resolve the tension over Kylie’s Puma endorsement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Digital Rage
programme.desc: The drama between Rob and the family flares up again after Chyna launches an app they find questionable. Meanwhile, Scott is on a mission to prove that Kourtney's allergies are fake.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby's DMV Appointment
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff and Food Network's Curtis Stone aim to knock their friend Bobby Flay down a couple of pegs. Washington D.C. veteran Todd Gray and Maryland's French-trained Gabonese caterer Serge Pambo go head to head.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: To Contend and Serve!
programme.desc: Naval chef Carla Harris brings her grit against seriously competitive chef Noah Schwartz, while Anne Burrell of Worst Cooks in America, and The Kitchen's Geoffrey Zakarian use their expertise to determine who has the arsenal to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Poking and Prodding
programme.desc: Judy Gold teams up with Katie Lee for the chance to poke fun at their dear friend Bobby Flay. Alex Stratta and Houman Gohary compete with the hopes to take on Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sour With The Sweet
programme.desc: Barbecue fusion master Robert Cho and over-the-top Brian Malarkey are hungry for a win. Food Network's Sunny Anderson and chef Josh Capon will be serving one of them up to Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Fields of Green
programme.desc: Worlds collide when Irish firecracker Chef Maeve Rochford squares off against Indian cuisine enthusiast Chef Navjot Arora.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Finding Stars
programme.desc: Food Network's Giada De Laurentiis and People Magazine's Jess Cagle reach for the stars when they match up Atlanta's dynamic Greek chef Pano Karatassos and New York City's Mimi Weissenborn to take down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Summer Lovin'
programme.desc: The summer heat wave takes hold of the kitchen, and Chef Carla Hall tries to beat the heat with TV announcer Steve Higgins. They recruit red-hot chefs Kathy Sidell and Vinson Petrillo to light a fire under Bobby Flay and take him out.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Forecasting a Win
programme.desc: America's favourite weatherman, Al Roker, joins Food Network's Katie Lee to bring a torrential downpour on Bobby Flay's day. Chefs Maris Grubb and Justin Walker will be cooking up a storm to try to rain on Bobby's parade.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Big Trouble in Tennessee
programme.desc: Big Tom's Backyard Grill and Bar in Cleveland, Tenn., has turned from a dream into a nightmare, and it's costing owners Tom and Sabrina their marriage.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: BBQ Hacks
programme.desc: A true Master of 'Cue must have the ability to handle any challenge or cooking condition, so the competitors have to prove their ability to pivot. Team captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson keep a close eye on their pitmasters.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Deja Flay
programme.desc: Beat Bobby Flay winner Anne Burrell is ready to battle once again, but this time she'll have to cook against hotshot chef Marcus Samuelsson. Food Network's Scott Conant sits back and relaxes as his dream team takes center stage.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Thrown From the Throne
programme.desc: "Chopped" judge Amanda Freitag and walking culinary encyclopedia Simon Majumdar hope they are a winning combination, as Virginia-bred chef Ian Boden matches up with up-and-coming New York City chef Danielle Duran in hopes of slaying the Flay.

programme.title: Hot Mess House: Basement and Playroom Hot Mess

programme.title: House Hunters: Culture Clash in Indianapolis
programme.desc: A young couple's backgrounds are making their first home purchase in Indianapolis a challenge. She grew up in the burbs and wants it all, while he's from Madagascar and doesn't mind keeping it simple.

programme.title: House Hunters: Town or Country in Cincinnati
programme.desc: Newlyweds are desperate to get out of her parents' basement and into their first home in Cincinnati. However, this country boy and his city girl have very different priorities, and her parents are pressuring them to buy nearby.

programme.title: House Hunters: Indecisive Coach in Missouri
programme.desc: Volleyball coaches want to buy their first home together in Columbia, Missouri, but one can't make a decision on a property.

programme.title: House Hunters: Never-Ending New Jersey Hunt
programme.desc: A couple is eager to get out of their tiny New York apartment and into a bigger place in New Jersey. They're looking for a home with a fenced-in yard for their dog, and she wants something very modern, but he prefers an older place with lots of character.

programme.title: House Hunters: Emotion Over Investment in Dallas
programme.desc: A first time buyer is excited to purchase a home that can also be a future rental investment in Dallas. He's looking for a two bedroom condo with an open style, but his best friend thinks he should find a place that he will enjoy as a home for himself.
