programme.title: Alien Highway: Missouri Mayhem
programme.desc: A rash of recent UFO sightings brings Chuck's team to Missouri, the home of the 1973 Piedmont lights incident. Armed with new evidence, they question whether history is repeating itself or if the activity never really subsided.

programme.title: Alien Highway: UFO Terror
programme.desc: A Missouri man who claims UFOs are stalking him reaches out to Chuck and the team for help. During the intense investigation, they uncover a dark secret which may explain why their client is experiencing so much UFO activity.

programme.title: Alien Highway: UFO Recovery
programme.desc: Chuck receives a map from an informant supposedly leading to a hidden cache of recovered materials from the Roswell incident. He and his team go on the treasure hunt of lifetime to locate what could be the mother lode of all UFO discoveries.

programme.title: Alien Highway: Legend of the Skinwalker
programme.desc: A recent creature sighting outside the infamous Skinwalker Ranch brings Chuck and the team to Utah to investigate. Evidence both on the ground and in the skies indicates the mysterious shapeshifter might actually be an alien.

programme.title: Alien Highway: SoCal Clusters
programme.desc: An ongoing flap of UFO sightings in and out of the water off the Southern California coastline leads Chuck and the team to investigate the connection between UFOs, the military and the ocean itself.

programme.title: Alien Highway: Arizona Anomalies

programme.title: Alien Highway: Escape From Area 51
programme.desc: After an informant relays a story of an alien that reportedly escaped from Area 51, Chuck and the team head to Tonapah, Nevada, to investigate whether this creature still roams the area.

programme.desc: Astonishing new evidence and modern-day UFO sightings have experts rethinking ancient otherworldly Native American myths.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Gods and Aliens
programme.desc: Myths and legends have long been regarded as fantastic stories that describe powerful gods, mutant giants and fearsome monsters. Take a look at why so many cultures separated by large distances tell the same stories.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Closer Encounters
programme.desc: Reports of strange encounters with mysterious beings and objects have occurred throughout history. A book from the 13th century recounts a story of a creature descending in a flying craft over Bristol, England and Christopher Columbus saw strange lights.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Mysterious legends and crumbling ruins are all that is left of our planet's lost worlds.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens, Gods and Heroes

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Viking Gods
programme.desc: Odin, Frey and Thor were gods worshipped by the Norse Vikings. Divine or with an extraterrestrial connection, they may have been the reason the Norse were among the most technologically advanced cultures of the ancient world.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Mysterious Mountains
programme.desc: Across ancient civilizations, the world's mountains were viewed as the sacred home to all-powerful gods. For the Greeks, it was the Olympians, and in Peru, Incan descendants continue an ancient pilgrimage to commune with mountain spirits known as Apu.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Stargates
programme.desc: Legends from around the world speak of sacred entryways to the land of the gods -- gates that allowed instant passage not just beyond the confines of Earth, but beyond space and time. Such legends are investigated in Turkey and Mexico.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens B.C.
programme.desc: Modern archaeologists are continuously unearthing artefacts and sites that defy the conventional timeline of human history.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Island of the Giants

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Head in the Oven
programme.desc: Two neighbouring bachelors start out as friends. Harmless banter turns into threats eventually igniting an escalating war. The violence ends with a murder so shocking it is almost beyond belief.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Bugs Bunny Defense
programme.desc: A woman claims she accidentally shot her husband when they were re-enacting a moment from a Bugs Bunny cartoon.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: The Chowchilla Kidnapping
programme.desc: Abducted by masked gunmen and buried alive in a truck trailer underground, 26 innocent school children spent 28 hours held hostage in the dark before they made a harrowing escape.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: How Did I Get Here?
programme.desc: When the remains of a young mother are discovered in a remote area outside Nashville, Detective Postiglione solves the crime by recalling a detail from the wooded scene and puts a dangerous murderer behind bars.

programme.title: To Catch a Killer: The Monkey on My Back
programme.desc: A chance meeting causes New York State Police Investigator Jim Horton of befriend infamous burglar Gary Evans.

programme.title: Disappeared: California Leaving
programme.desc: Former Harlem Globetrotter Rico Harris is driving from LA to Seattle and mysteriously vanishes. When his car is found abandoned in a remote area, investigators and his loved ones embark on a journey that grows more baffling as time passes.

programme.title: Disappeared: Last Stop
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Tabitha Tuders vanishes walking to her bus stop in Nashville, TN. Police think she's a runaway but it appears that there are disturbing circumstances behind her disappearance.

programme.title: Living a Nightmare: Deadly Message
programme.desc: A young man who overcame a devastating brain injury enters a taxi and never resurfaces. Police are at a loss until they receive a mysterious text that pivots the case in a new direction and intensifies the race to bring Julian Williams home alive.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: CSI Slay
programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman is brutally murdered in her home. The NYPD follows a trail of complicated forensic clues to unravel the truth about who killed her, until a shocking discovery reveals that her murder is not what it seems.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Portrait of a Killer
programme.desc: A teenager said after he killed an elderly couple that 'it felt amazing.' Now a controversial law could set him free at age 25.

programme.title: Predator at Large: We're Talking About A Serial Killer
programme.desc: When a pregnant woman and her infant son vanish on a walk to their local corner store, the close-knit town of Deerfield Beach is terrified. When the woman turns up dead, the community is convinced that they have a killer living in their midst.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Beauty for Ashes
programme.desc: In 2016, 33-year-old Tricia Todd was reported missing after failing to pick up her daughter from a babysitter. As her family hoped and prayed, investigators found her online journal that revealed the true horror of what had happened.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: In Case of Murder
programme.desc: The untimely death of Melissa Henderson, wife and mother of two, rattles a small Indiana town -- but revelations of foul play at her funeral set the rumor mill ablaze. Local gossip leads investigators to a riverboat casino with unexpected suspects.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Only if There's Something in It for Me
programme.desc: While being questioned in the abduction of an Anchorage barista, a young local businessman starts negotiating with investigators to reveal details of a depraved secret life as one of America's most meticulous and psychopathic serial killers.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Voice from the Grave
programme.desc: Dancer Stephanie Bruner walks out on her husband during a Colorado blizzard and is never seen alive again. When search parties find her body in a river, the manhunt changes to a murder investigation.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Chosin: One Way Out
programme.desc: Trapped and outnumbered seven to one early in the Korean War, US Marines must fight their way out or die.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Long Range Strikers
programme.desc: In every theatre of war, long-range weaponry gives you the ability to reach out and touch your opponent while staying out of harm's way. It's a critical edge that can be the difference between victory and defeat.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: The Indestructibles
programme.desc: When it comes to military hardware, tough is what keeps you alive. Take a look at the toughest military hardware on the planet.

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Surgical Strikers
programme.desc: The ability to deploy precision strike weapons has completely changed the nature of war. Advances in weapon technology have made it possible to send a missile through a specific window of a building from a thousand miles away.

programme.title: Weaponology: Booby Traps
programme.desc: Dangerous and infinitely adaptable, traps are the hidden killers of the battlefield.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fire Weapons
programme.desc: Witness how fire has become a terrifying weapon of mass destruction, burning hotter, harder and longer - from the simple Molotov cocktail to the awesome destructive power of today's thermo baric bombs.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: El Chapo: Caught!
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera aka El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the US marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Retreat Pool
programme.desc: A mountain lodge with incredible views is missing one thing: a pool. Brian and Paul Porter weather rain storms to give a family an amazing outdoor living area featuring a spa with a walk-up bar, swim jets and a fire basin.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Southern Oasis Pool
programme.desc: A family wants to turn their flat Houston, Texas, yard into a southern oasis. Unpredictable weather, tricky soil conditions and some new material leaves Paul and Brian figuring out how to blow the family's expectations out of the water.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Rocky Road to Backyard Bliss
programme.desc: A Nashville family is ready for Kyle and Justin to build the perfect pool in their backyard. The project gets off to a rocky start, but the Poll Kings deliver a phenomenal backyard complete with a massive waterfall and beautiful pavilion.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Living La Vida Lakeside
programme.desc: After 14 years of dreaming, a Lake Jackson, Texas, family is finally building their custom home on a piece of land around Pecan Lake. Located on a peninsula, the backyard leaves the ideal space to build a one-of-a-kind vanishing edge pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Desert Oasis in Sin City
programme.desc: Mike Baldasare and Jim Bellamy, two best friends that build award winning pools for clients all across the southwest, head to Las Vegas to build a dream pool for Shane and Willow Jager's brand new dream home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Modern Mountain Pool
programme.desc: A family enhances their spectacular mountain view with a breathtaking oversized pool featuring an infinity edge. An outdoor kitchen and firepit complete the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Eyesore to Elegance
programme.desc: After renovating a fixer-upper into their dream home, a couple is ready to add the final touch by restoring the old pool. Paul and Brian Porter create a modern oasis by adding an infinity edge spa, fire bowls and a luxury barbecue area.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Partygoers Pool
programme.desc: The Caviness family build spectacular over-the-top pools.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountaintop Luxury Lagoon
programme.desc: The Leasure family's new house in the hills above Folsom, CA, comes with breathtaking lakeside views, and their big pool dreams will make it a perfect home. But rocky soil and tricky plumbing designs create a big challenge for the team.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Vegas Jackpot Swimming Pool
programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Caribbean Spa
programme.desc: With three energetic kids and lots of friends, a family needs a pool to keep everyone entertained. They create a masterpiece that includes a huge deck for Dad, a Baja shelf for Mom and multiple water features.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Triples Infinity Edge
programme.desc: After saving for years, a couple of former teachers are splurging on the perfect pool for their new house in Austin, Texas. The nature lovers want a great view with sounds of waterfalls and space for family to visit.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Country Store and Gas Station
programme.desc: The crew heads to Grottoes, Virginia, to salvage and demolish an old country store. Using materials from the project, Mike and Robert create a tribute bench for a veterans' retreat.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Deck Fit For Fun
programme.desc: A couple's home in Parker, Colorado, needs a major deck overhaul to take advantage of the incredible views of the Rocky Mountains and downtown Denver. A huge budget allows the Mega Decks crew to design deck like no other.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Modern, Zen Oasis With A Rustic Escape
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team has to turn a sunroom, concrete patio, and dirt landing by the pond into one cohesive space. After tearing out the sunroom, they build a steel framed deck with a flat roof that's connected to the existing patio.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Masterpiece
programme.desc: A mountain home in Conifer, Colorado, gets a $375K deck with a wall-sized stone fireplace, a hot tub that seats 12 and a grill kitchen. Jason's team is pitted against Mother Nature, however, when an icy road leads to a delivery truck crash.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Log Cabin Luxe
programme.desc: To help this tiny deck achieve mega status, massive 40-foot-long Western red cedar logs are trucked in from Canada. The finished product has a three-tier pizza oven, a six-foot gas fire rail, and extra tall glass panels.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Texas Transformation in Port Aransas
programme.desc: A woman and her kids have been vacationing in Port Aransas, TX, for years and are ready to own a piece of their favorite paradise.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Living Large on Long Island, New York
programme.desc: A couple looks for a cozy beach home in the North Fork of Long Island, New York, for their family of six to enjoy throughout the year. They find a diamond in the rough and have big plans to update the look and transform it into a bright, welcoming space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Oceanfront Oasis
programme.desc: Outdoor enthusiasts Nick and Krystin are looking for an oceanfront property in Jacksonville Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Candice and Brian are moving from Denver, Colo. to Cocoa Beach, Fla., and have enlisted broker Andy Barclay to help them find a home on the water with a pool and a large outdoor space for their two daughters.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Serious Spice
programme.desc: Good food is the spice of life, and we're adding a little kick with our flavor-filled favourites.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Dallas
programme.desc: Discover some of the hottest spots in Dallas, Texas, from brisket to fried chicken.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: Andrew explores the bountiful larder and proud history that provides chefs in the Scottish Highlands with the building blocks for uniquely Highland dishes. He enjoys lean, flavourful Highland beef, buttery shellfish, and handheld meat pies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Harlem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Harlem, a vibrant New York City neighborhood with a diverse cross-section of cultures. He highlights its colorful restaurants offering soul food, Caribbean classics, and even the national dish of Senegal.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Krakow
programme.desc: From peasant food to royal snacks, Andrew reveals what makes the food scene in Krakow, Poland, so delicious. The city's edible symbols take the form of pierogis, hearty stuffed cabbage rolls and whole-roasted pork knuckle.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern finds that you can still get a taste of the Wild West in the food of Denver, offering a goldmine of flavours from the past and present.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Mexico
programme.desc: The frontier spirit can still be found in New Mexico even when it comes to the food.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Holy Smokes
programme.desc: Three chefs are burning to impress the judges as they take to the grills in the Wildfire Round. The Crossfire Round is a battle between land and sea and then it's back to basics for the Feast of Fire.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland (Maine)
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, ME. His main event awaits him at the Tradewinds Café where he'll take on the Manimal Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Doc McStuffins: Big Head Hallie/ Peaches Pie, Take a Bath!
programme.desc: When Hallie sees her toy has its own TV show, The Hallie Hippo Happy Hour, she gets a big head. When Alma’s new doll Peaches Pie is dragged through mud she smells not so sweet.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town/ The Last Pupicorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Blue Belt/ The Playcare Heist
programme.desc: Bob's blue belt doesn't arrive in time for his martial arts class photo, so Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to get him a belt. When Keia realizes she accidentally left her favorite stuffed animal at Playcare, she and the pugs set off to rescue it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Bluey: Trains/ Queens/ Flat Pack
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo commute on the Dad-Train. Mum is crowned Queen with the girls as her butlers. Bluey and Bingo construct a mini-civilization.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: It's My Party/ Keeping Up with the Humphries
programme.desc: Alvin decides to host the coolest paintball party ever at his house for Kevin's birthday. Then, when the Chipmunks try to keep up with the neighbourhood bully's powerful computer game, they end up causing a gigantic disaster.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin's Secret Powers/ I Will Survive
programme.desc: Alvin tells Theodore that he has secret powers and can turn trash into candy. Later, when Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner.

programme.title: Movie: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: With April's help, the Turtles find out that The Shredder has returned and has hired a scientist to create mutants of his own. Adding to their troubles, New York City is invaded by an extraterrestrial army. The Turtles face their toughest fight yet.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: King Chang/ The End of the Universe-ity
programme.desc: Mark Chang is called back to the planet Yugopotamia; Dark Laser's back.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Flea Market/ Copy Can't
programme.desc: Bobby struggles to give up control of the mercado; Ronnie Anne notices that she's the only person Carlitos won't copy.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fandom Pains/ Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: The Loud House: Store Wars With the Casagrandes/ Lucha Fever With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When a fancy grocery store opens on the block, Bobby rallies the family to do everything they can to compete. Ronnie Anne fakes being sick to watch a Lucha Libre match, which proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: The Loud House: Everybody Loves Leni/ Middle Men
programme.desc: Torn between her work friends and her school friends, Leni tries to bring everyone together. When Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

programme.title: The Loud House: Face the Music With the Casagrandes/ Pranks for the Memories With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Ronnie Anne discovers that each family member will perform at Hector's birthday, she turns to Sid for help. Ronnie Anne's attempts to bond with her cool older cousin Carlota lead to a prank war against the boy cousins.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Broken Alarm/ Karen's Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his alarm clock and nothing else is loud enough to wake him up. And, Karen learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Pictures, Please/ Stuck on the Roof
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom. SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he won't let that stop him from living his life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money
programme.desc: Sandy attempts to study Patrick and SpongeBob. Mr. Krab announces he's getting married.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: The group arrives at the witch’s castle for an epic battle of swords and spells, and a surprise admission from Stacey that shocks her father.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Rise and Shine/ Waiting/ Fungus Among Us
programme.desc: A look inside Patrick Star's rock, and his daily routine. SpongeBob finds out his favourite cereal has a mail in prize and goes to great length to get the toy, but earning the toy proves easier than waiting for it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes obsessed with the idea that Squid must try a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Rock a Bi-Valve
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick find an abandoned baby clam and decided to rear the child as their own. SpongeBob takes on the role of mother, while Patrick becomes the Father who goes to work.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Sneeze the Day/ Tooth Fairy Ducks
programme.desc: Buhdeuce gets a cold and then gives it to the Bread Maker, which causes his magic to go haywire. After accidentally taking the Tooth Fairy out of action, SwaySway and Buhdeuce have to level up into Tooth Fairy Ducks.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Enemy-in-Law/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI
programme.desc: Krabs is horrified when he learns that the secret paramour dating his mother is Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob's House Party
programme.desc: While grocery shopping, SpongeBob discovers a 'How to Throw a Party' kit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy go away for the weekend; Bob becomes a stand-up comic.

programme.title: The Loud House: Stage Plight/ Antiqued Off
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer to her crush, Benny, Luan tries out for the school play. When Clyde and schoolmate Zach bond over antiques, Lincoln finds himself feeling like a third wheel.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roll Model With the Casagrandes/ No Show With the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero. Ronnie Anne secretly starts watching her family's favorite tv show after refusing to watch it with them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Attention Deficit/ Out on a Limo
programme.desc: Clyde's dads give Lincoln more attention than he gets at home. Lincoln wins a ride in a limo and starts to change after soaking up the good life.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Write Stuff/ Racing Hearts
programme.desc: When Lucy quits the writing club at school due to the by-the-books way Huggins runs the club, Mom takes over. When Luna and Sam embark on a challenge taking place across Royal Woods, they discover they have less in common than they thought.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roughin' It/ The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Lincoln is worried that he's lost his manliness from growing up with all sisters, so he and Clyde go camping. Lincoln gets Lori a job at a pizza arcade, but when he starts to ask favors of her, Lori gets in hot water.

programme.title: The Loud House: Absent Minded/ Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn the junior administrator job, but doesn't want to give up the perks that come along with it. When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lincoln Loud: Girl Guru/ Come Sale Away
programme.desc: For a class assignment, Lincoln and Clyde must start a business, so they decide to sell Lincoln's girl expertise. It's time for the Loud family annual garage sale, and every kid is determined to out-sell the others.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Yard/ Raw Deal
programme.desc: When Lincoln's mom signs him up for peewee football, Lincoln schemes to have Lynn take his spot.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Man Ray Returns/ Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation. Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanitation Insanity/ Bunny Hunt
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom. A sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute.

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Three friends are trying to get home to New York City. Their travels end up in them joining a travelling circus in Europe to disguise them so they do not get caught or draw attention to themselves. They reinvent the circus in their own way.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Jeanette's Secret Garden/ Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Jeanette decides to plant a garden on the school grounds, but Bocarter manages to install vending machines instead.When Alvin finds a treasure map in Miss Croner's basement, the Chipmunks set off in search of lost treasure.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Unboxing Day/ Dave's Pavilion
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Something's Fishy/ Presto Chang-O
programme.desc: Timmy is at the beach and he's bored silly. Wanting to go diving, he wishes to become a fish; Timmy hasn't studied for a test in Mr. Crocker's class so he wishes for a device that allows him to change places with anyone who comes in contact with it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Open Wide and Say 'Ahhh!'/ Oddpirates
programme.desc: Timmy has to have his tonsils removed! And his nurse is Vicky, who's determined to make his stay as painful as possible. The Pirates opening game is today, and everyone except Timmy is going, instead he is on a real Pirate ship.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Birthday Wish/ Go Young, West Man
programme.desc: Adam West never had a 'normal' childhood; Timmy loans his godparents to Tootie.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Timmy's 2D House of Horror/ It's a Wishful Life
programme.desc: A lava flow threatens Vicky's house; Timmy wishes he was never born.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Bo Bo Business/ Blunder Party
programme.desc: After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Chimpmania/ Dad Jokes
programme.desc: Jeanette and the Chipmunks orchestrate a break-in at Bocarter's house to rescue a chimpanzee he keeps in a cage. Alvin is alarmed that Dave will be hosting an auction where he'll have to tell jokes because he's not that funny.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sick As A Chipmunk/ Instant Gram
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Boyfriend From 27,000 B.C./ Voyage to the Bottom of Buford
programme.desc: Boys go on an archaeological dig and find a real caveman; he falls in love with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Put That Putter Away/ Does This Duckbill Make Me Look Fat?
programme.desc: Candace is sick and recruits Stacy to bust Phineas and Ferb building mini-golf course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Traffic Cam Caper/ Bowl-R-Rama Drama
programme.desc: Candace tried to prove her brothers inventions by getting footage from a traffic camera.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Monster of Phineas-n-Ferbenstein/ Oil on Candace
programme.desc: Boys set off to Central America to help a Damsel in Distress Isabella.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Missing Links of Moorshire!
programme.desc: Dewey's natural golf abilities challenge Scrooge's ego while a seemingly innocent, mystical golf course leads the group into trouble.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System!
programme.desc: When Mark Beaks invents an uncrashable self-driving car, threatened Launchpad recruits Gyro's eager intern Fenton to help him defeat the mechanical menace.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Undercover Carl/ Hip Hip Parade
programme.desc: When Carl intercepts blue prints for Phineas and Ferb's Anti-Gravity Fun Launcher, he mistakenly thinks that they are assisting Dr. Doofenshmirtz with an evil plan so Major Monogram sends him incognito to uncover what the boys are doing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: We Call It Maze/ Ladies and Gentlemen, Meet Max Modem!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb create a life sized maze filled with fun obstacles. But things don't go as planned when the Little Sparks try out the maze. Lawrence asks the boys to help him turn into a pop star so he can perform with Linda at a Lindana concert.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Nerds of a Feather
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb attend a Comic Book Convention in Danville and they are excited to show some of their designs to one of their heroes.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Parker's Gotta Go
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Chadboard Box
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Best Frog Friends
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: She's the Mayor/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: While Candace and Stacy's relationship is put to the test, Phineas and Ferb build the ultimate lemonade stand and begin to offer franchise opportunities. Candace is awarded the opportunity to be mayor for the day, which she uses to her advantage.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Hawaiian Vacation
programme.desc: During a Hawaiian family vacation, Candace finds a cool lava rock necklace and is plagued with bad luck, so a native tells her she must take it to the top of a volcano, which spoils the cool, calm vibe she learned from a Hawaiian yoga instructor.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Unfair Science Fair / Unfair Science Fair Redux
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out to Launch
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rocket ship to get a better look and their mom and dad's star.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Got Game?/ Comet, Comet, Comet, Comet Kermilian
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb organize 'The F Games' for Buford and Isabella.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out of Toon/ Hail Doofania!
programme.desc: Boys create a cartoon and cast themselves as superheroes and the villain is Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lake Nose Monster
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb set out to rescue the mysterious Lake Nose monster from the effects of living in a zinc-less lake.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Interview With a Platypus/ Tip of the Day
programme.desc: Animal translator built so the boys can figure out what Perry is really trying to say.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Attack of the 50 Foot Sister/ Backyard Aquarium
programme.desc: The boys create a PhineasandFerbalizer to speed up the growing process of vegetables.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Day of the Living Gelatin!/ Elementary, My Dear Stacy
programme.desc: Pool filled with bouncy gelatin and it comes to life; later family takes trip to England.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Don't Even Blink/ Chez Platypus
programme.desc: A determined Candace decides to find out where her brothers creations disappear to, and Phineas and Ferb open a platypus themed restaurant.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Perry Lays an Egg/ Gaming the System
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an egg, which they believe belongs to Perry, so they build a mechanical contraption to care for it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Chronicles of Meap
programme.desc: Space pod crashes carrying an unbearable cute alien, Meap; another adventure begins.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Thaddeus and Thor/ De Plane! De Plane!
programme.desc: Candace, Phineas and Ferb compete with their look-alikes; Candace goes to a party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Let's Take a Quiz/ At the Car Wash
programme.desc: Candace wants to win popularity by going on Phineas and Ferb's TV game show. Later, an automatic carwash is created to help Isabella and the Fireside girls meet their fundraising goals.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Oh, There You Are, Perry/ Swiss Family Phineas
programme.desc: A musical device is built to find Perry/ A trip at sea strands the family on an island.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Musical Cliptastic Countdown
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram host a viewers' choice countdown special featuring the Top 10 favorite musical numbers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Quantum Boogaloo
programme.desc: Future Candace follows Phineas and Ferb through time when the boys try to find a yet-to-be invented tool for their rollercoaster. However, Candace's actions unwittingly prevent Agent P from defeating of Dr. Doofenshmirtz, which alters the future.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Hide and Seek/ That Sinking Feeling

programme.desc: Baljeet signs up for rock camp and Vanessa tries to convince her dad she is responsible.

programme.desc: Take a special look at the 2018 Texas baseball team including Andy McGuire's return to Austin, Matteo Bocchi's path from Italy to Texas, the Jake of all trades and Augie Garrido's impact on baseball.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XII
programme.desc: Shane Buechele honours a childhood friend every game, Jhonattan Vegas takes a path from Venezuela to the PGA Tour, the author of Dear Andrew discusses his battle with leukemia and Matt Coleman's recruitment builds to on of the best games of his career.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XIII
programme.desc: Jordan and Jerry Windle share a bond and Mo Bamba was shaped by the courts of Harlem. Plus, look at Connor Williams's experience at the NFL draft.

programme.title: What Starts Here
programme.desc: Each semester, Longhorn Network will go behind the scenes to investigate the most compelling academic stories in and around the 40 Acres as part of this new thirty-minute program.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: Cactus Cafe: Comos Las Movies
programme.desc: This episode showcases contemporary synth-cumbia quartet, Como Las Movies.

programme.title: Longhorn Arts & Culture: Cactus Cafe: Teddy Glass
programme.desc: Guest speakers and cultural events at the University of Texas.

programme.title: LHN Stories: XVII
programme.desc: Sam Ehlinger, Andrew Jones and Alex Watson are three Texas athletes who exemplify the term 'Texas Tough.' We chronicle the obstacles they have had to overcome and how these experiences shaped their lives.

programme.title: Longhorn Film Showcase
programme.desc: Short student films from the Department of Radio, Television and Film are featured. From insightful narratives and documentaries to cutting-edge pieces, these films represent just a sampling of the award-winning work done by UT's film students.
